name: Hook Harvest
summary: Triage hooks: accept, defer, or reject
purpose: Collect, cluster, and triage hooks from creative work. Decide what advances now, what defers, and what gets rejected. Fast ideas, safe canon.
description: Hook Harvest is the triage loop. Showrunner sweeps up newly proposed hooks from Story Spark, Scene Weave, and other creative bursts. The goal is to remove duplicates, cluster related ideas, annotate with uncertainty and dependencies, and make clear decisions: accepted (with next loop), deferred (with wake condition), or rejected (with reason). This loop maintains velocity by keeping the hook backlog clean.

triggers.condition: After Story Spark or Scene Weave produces hooks
Before a stabilization window or merge train
Hook backlog feels fuzzy or has drifted

required_artifacts.description: Hook cards in proposed state awaiting triage
Hook cards updated with triage decisions

collection.name: Collection
collection.purpose: Sweep all proposed hooks and remove obvious duplicates

gather_hooks.action: Collect all hook cards in proposed state. Identify and link duplicates—do not delete, preserve provenance.
gather_hooks.guidance: Use search_workspace to find all proposed hooks. When you find duplicates, link them (one references the other) rather than deleting. This preserves the source of ideas.

clustering.name: Clustering
clustering.purpose: Group hooks by theme and type for efficient triage

group_by_theme.action: Cluster hooks by theme (e.g., character arc, location, faction) and then by type (narrative, scene, factual, taxonomy).
group_by_theme.guidance: Good clusters make triage faster. Group by what the hook affects, not by who proposed it. A hook about 'Wormhole economy' should cluster with other economy hooks.

outputs.name: clustered_hooks
outputs.description: Hooks organized by theme and type

completion_criteria: All hooks assigned to a cluster

annotation.name: Annotation
annotation.purpose: Add triage tags, uncertainty levels, and dependencies to each hook

add_metadata.action: For each hook, add or confirm: triage tag (quick-win, needs-research, structure-impact, style-impact, deferred, reject), uncertainty level for factual hooks, and dependencies.
add_metadata.guidance: Consult specialists as needed: Plotwright for structure impact, Scene Smith for scene viability, Gatekeeper for quality bar risks. Mark which dormant roles would need to wake.

completion_criteria: Every hook has a triage tag

decision.name: Decision
decision.purpose: Make final accept/defer/reject decisions for each hook

triage_decision.action: Mark each hook as accepted (with next loop and owner), deferred (with reason and wake condition), or rejected (with reason).
triage_decision.guidance: Promote now if: untangles contradictions, strengthens nonlinearity, improves player comprehension, low coupling high gain. Defer if: requires dormant roles, triggers wide churn, depends on unverified externals. Reject if: duplicate, violates boundaries, creates unwinnable states.

assign_next_loop.action: For accepted hooks, assign the next loop: story_spark (topology changes), scene_weave (prose needs), lore_deepening (canon required), codex_expansion (taxonomy), style_pass (voice).
assign_next_loop.guidance: Most accepted hooks go to lore_deepening in Wave 3. For Wave 1, hooks requiring topology changes go back to story_spark; hooks requiring prose work go to scene_weave.

completion_criteria: Accepted hooks have next loop and owner

packaging.name: Packaging
packaging.purpose: Produce Harvest Sheet and prepare handoffs

create_harvest_sheet.action: Produce a Harvest Sheet summarizing: date, clusters, accepted hooks (with owners and next loops), deferred hooks (with wake conditions), rejected hooks (with reasons), risk notes, activation requests.
create_harvest_sheet.guidance: The Harvest Sheet is the handoff document. It should be human-readable and actionable. Include which dormant roles should wake for upcoming work.

update_hook_cards.action: Update all hook cards with final status, triage tags, uncertainty levels, and routing information.

on_success.message: Harvest complete. Accepted hooks routed to next loops. Showrunner has activation list.

conditional.condition: Accepted hooks classified as structure-impact or topology changes
conditional.description: Process hooks requiring structural changes to narrative topology

conditional.condition: Accepted hooks classified as scene-level or prose needs
conditional.description: Process hooks requiring prose additions or revisions

conditional.condition: Accepted hooks classified as factual or requiring canon research
conditional.description: Build canon required by accepted hooks
